title: Fyers South Asia Partners is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Fyers South Asia Partners is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Fyers South Asia Partners in Patna is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Fyers South Asia Partners:
Fyers South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fyers South Asia Partners!
